message:
🐛 Fix silent error handling in ClusterRole update and sync endpoint (#4129)

- Check ClusterRole update errors instead of discarding them with `_, _`,
  ensuring RBAC failures are surfaced before dependent GPU health jobs run
  (fixes #4113)
- Return 501 with synced:false from the sync endpoint instead of falsely
  reporting success when no sync logic is implemented (fixes #4114)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
